blockingIssues.description: The rerun removes AccountingIdempotencyService and the public super-wrapper chain, but AccountingCoreEngineCore still retains duplicate public journal owners (`createStandardJournal`, `createManualJournal`, and `createJournalEntry`) alongside JournalEntryService, so the monolith remains a live runtime owner instead of leaving JournalEntryService as the sole canonical journal owner.

rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this rerun still fails because journal ownership remains split between AccountingCoreEngineCore and JournalEntryService, so refreshing the module guidance now would risk documenting a transient partial state instead of the final canonical ownership.
